title: Kaleido video-first program over loaded clip

metricComparisons.description: kaleido program (nSides=9) folds the clip into 9-way reflective symmetry — the mirroring averages regional contrast, so spatialStd should DECREASE vs the raw video baseline (observed ~-0.12 over two runs; threshold -0.05 with ~2x margin)

expectedVideo: applying kaleido should fold the clip into a 9-sided prism with restrained motion feedback
expectedAudio: the coupled motion should read as prismatic widening rather than pure delay wash
audio side is MANUAL REVIEW ONLY: program-level exported-audio gates land with M5.7-143
manualChecks: Does the 9-sided fold preserve enough of the source's gestural motion to feel like a video treatment rather than abstract symmetry?
Does the modulated delay add prismatic widening rather than just blur?
